text.title: API Gateway Resilience Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the api-gateway-resilience methodology end-to-end.

step.name: profile-traffic
step.action: Pull per-route RPS percentiles + p95 latency from last 30 days.
step.decision-gate: If no observability data, ship api-gateway-observability first and stop.

step.name: set-rate-limits
step.action: Set per-consumer + per-route limits at 2-3x observed p99; mark anonymous endpoints with IP-fallback limit.

step.name: configure-breakers
step.decision-gate: If upstream has no SLA, refuse to set a breaker — record an open question in the audit log.

step.name: tune-retries
step.action: GET: 3 attempts with backoff; POST/PUT/DELETE: only with Idempotency-Key, 2 attempts.
step.decision-gate: Block merge if any non-idempotent retry policy is configured without the idempotency-key guard.

step.name: set-timeouts
step.action: default_ms = 5000; per-upstream overrides bounded by SLA + 50% headroom.
